events.label: assistant
events.text: Assessment written to `/app/answer.json`: this is a **fail**, critical risk. Hot work is proceeding directly over an unprotected sewer/drain — a sequence violation because hazard mitigation (permit issuance, atmosphere testing, drain covering/shielding, combustible clearance, fire watch posting) must precede introduction of an ignition source, per NFPA 51B and OSHA 1926 Subpart J. Sparks/slag entering the drain risk igniting trapped flammable vapors and propagating fire through the connected sewer system. Immediate stop-work and corrective sequence (test atmosphere → shield opening → clear combustibles → post fire watch → resume) is required before hot work continues.
